execution_history.reason: Portfolio iterative refinements complete. Optimized allocations and composition now deliver Sharpe >2.4, beta 0.64, max drawdown -13%, and average portfolio correlation 0.23 baseline. Portfolio tilts slightly toward growth/momentum/quality, but reduces cluster and beta risk effectively versus original. Stress test, factor, and scenario analytics all confirm improved risk-adjusted returns and resilience. Ready for final output presentation.
